$comment: c37 D-CSUBSET-FUNCTION-DESIGNATOR-CAST: a function designator cast to a fn-ptr typedef (the sqlite (sqlite3_destructor_type)fn / syscall-pointer shape), then called through. C 6.3.2.1p4 + 6.3.2.3p8 — the designator decays to the function's address; the cast is a no-op Bitcast, the call-through reaches helper. RED-ON-DISABLE: pre-c37 (fp_t)helper was a spurious S_InvalidCast so it would not compile; exit 42 confirms the address is correct. int 32-bit ops + a direct call (no p+n). Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
